daily_tasks.description: Check on the allotment in the garden
Lunch and a glass of water
Call Helen on the video tablet

key_memories.title: 50 years with Rose
key_memories.story: You and Rose danced to You Are My Sunshine at your golden wedding in 2018. The same song as your very first dance in 1968.

key_memories.title: Your grandson Oliver
key_memories.story: Helen had a baby boy called Oliver in May 2026. He has your eyes. You will meet him very soon.

key_memories.title: Your daughter Helen
key_memories.story: In 1985 you held tiny Helen in your arms at Bristol Royal Infirmary. In 2024 she held yours on the Royal Mile in Edinburgh. Same love. Always.

key_memories.title: Building bridges with code
key_memories.story: For 30 years you wrote the software that kept Bristol's bridges standing. Engineers across the UK used your work every day.

late_wife.name: Rose Thomas
late_wife.note: Childhood sweethearts — same Bristol street. Married 1968. Golden anniversary 2018. Passed 2023. Memory policy: redirect. Panic voice line: 'George, you are safe at home. Rose loved this song.'

music_track.title: You Are My Sunshine
music_track.memoryTouch: Rose and George danced to this together.

demo_activity_log.description: Calming voice played — You Are My Sunshine started
Oliver memory opened — George asked about the baby
